title: Contact Form — Getting in Touch
description: Add a contact form to the Contact section. The form should use method="post" and include labeled inputs for name and email, a textarea for the message, and a submit button. Each input must have a corresponding label element.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 7: Contact Form # Add a form with name, email, message fields, labels, and submit button. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

About Me | Projects | Contact

Welcome to my portfolio!

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

SkillLevelYears
HTMLBeginner1
CSSBeginner1
PythonIntermediate2

My Projects

Contact

Get in touch with me.

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower() and '</form>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <form> element'
assert 'method="post"' in html.lower() or "method='post'" in html.lower(), 'Form must have method="post"'
assert '<input' in html.lower(), 'Must include <input> elements for name and email'
assert '<textarea' in html.lower() and '</textarea>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <textarea> for the message'
assert '<label' in html.lower(), 'Must include <label> elements for form fields'
assert html.lower().count('<label') >= 2, f'Need at least 2 labels, found {html.lower().count("<label")}'
_has_submit = 'type="submit"' in html.lower() or "type='submit'" in html.lower() or '<button' in html.lower()
assert _has_submit, 'Must include a submit button (input type="submit" or <button>)'
acceptance_criteria: Input fields for name and email
Label elements for each input field
hints: Label and input pair: <label for="name">Name:</label><input type="text" id="name" name="name">
